_comment: Epic N (ADR 0035) N-S3 — C++ namespace resolution on the tree-sitter floor (ceiling `likely`). A function inside `namespace ns { }` is qualified `ns::f` (decl pass treats the namespace as an enclosing scope, like a class in N-S1), accumulating through nesting (`outer::inner::deep`). A bare call from WITHIN the namespace resolves enclosing-first (C++ unqualified lookup searches the enclosing namespace): `side()` inside `geometry::area` -> `geometry::side`. A SCOPED call binds to the declaration whose node id is the call's FULL `::`-path: `compute -> geometry::area`, `main -> geometry::side`, and crucially `useDeep -> outer::inner::deep` (NOT the unrelated `inner::deep` of `struct inner` — the full-path match means a deep call never collides with a 2-segment tail). `text::helper` is a distinct namespace member, unreachable from `main`. Cross-FILE namespace resolution and `using` declarations are deferred (disclosed); an unknown scope/name stays `unresolved`.
